overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a futuristic commercial interior with illuminated TECHNICA floor panels, ascending stairs to exit the building, then exploring an outdoor urban plaza beneath an elevated highway. The scene features cyberpunk neon lighting, holographic advertisements including a giant blue jellyfish, and scattered pedestrians in a high-tech city environment at night.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic commercial lobby with illuminated floor displays

events.description: turns left while walking across the lobby to approach the main staircase

agents.ego_description: walking through the modern commercial lobby across illuminated TECHNICA floor panels

notable_agents.action: walking across the lobby in casual attire

entered.detail: illuminated glass floor panels displaying the TECHNICA logo in white text
large digital screens mounted on walls showing colorful advertisements
wide staircase with dark steps leading to the upper level exit

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a sleek, modern commercial lobby with polished marble floors and illuminated TECHNICA branded glass panels underfoot. Digital billboards line the left wall while the camera walks forward, turns left, and approaches a wide staircase. Sparse pedestrians walk through the artificially lit interior space.

scene_state.functional_zone: stairwell transitioning from interior to exterior urban environment

events.description: ascending stairs and transitioning from indoor lobby to outdoor urban environment with city skyline becoming visible
lighting shifts from warm artificial interior to cooler mixed neon and natural night sky illumination

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs toward the city street exit, transitioning from enclosed interior to open air

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with metal railings leading upward
large blue glowing holographic jellyfish advertisement floating between skyscrapers
tall modern building with illuminated windows and corporate logo near the top

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a wide concrete stairwell, transitioning from the enclosed lobby to the exterior urban environment. As the stairs climb, the night sky and towering skyscrapers become visible, including a massive blue holographic jellyfish advertisement floating between buildings. The lighting shifts from warm interior to cooler neon-tinged exterior illumination.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza walkway beneath elevated highway with holographic views

events.description: reaches top of stairs and turns right to follow the covered pathway beneath the elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered pathway beneath the elevated highway, passing pedestrians on benches

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a concrete bench facing the walkway
person in white dress descending the stairs

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel highway structure overhead with yellow structural beams and neon lighting
tall vertical poles emitting bright cyan neon light along the pathway
modern concrete seating structures with integrated lighting where pedestrians rest

segments.scene_description: Exiting the building, the camera turns right onto a wide paved walkway beneath an elevated highway overpass. The area is illuminated by cyan neon light poles and features concrete benches where pedestrians sit. The massive blue holographic jellyfish remains visible in the distance between skyscrapers while digital billboards line the left wall. The ground appears wet, reflecting the neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: deeper underpass section with graffiti and food advertisements

events.description: passing wall with large white BROKEN graffiti tag, environment becomes darker and more enclosed

agents.ego_description: continuing along the underpass walkway, passing seated pedestrians and approaching a stairway

notable_agents.action: person in red jacket and white cap sitting on illuminated bench
two people standing and conversing near the railing overlooking the lower level

entered.detail: concrete wall with large white graffiti text spelling BROKEN
large illuminated advertisement displaying EEZY BEEF burger promotion

segments.scene_description: The walkway continues deeper under the highway overpass, becoming darker and more enclosed. A large wall with white BROKEN graffiti appears ahead, while digital food advertisements line the left side. The holographic jellyfish fades from view in the distance. Pedestrians sit on illuminated benches along the right side, and the camera approaches another set of stairs leading upward as the segment ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a polished commercial interior out into a neon-lit urban plaza beneath a massive highway overpass. It begins in a sleek lobby with illuminated TECHNICA glass panels and digital billboards, moving forward and turning left toward a wide staircase. As the camera ascends the stairs, the environment transitions from warm interior lighting to a cool, neon-tinged night sky where a massive blue holographic jellyfish floats between towering skyscrapers. Upon exiting the building, the scene opens onto a wet, paved walkway reflecting cyan light poles and distant billboards before turning right to move deeper under the concrete shadow of the overpass. The space then becomes darker and more enclosed, passing white BROKEN graffiti and digital food advertisements while the holographic jellyfish fades from view, finally approaching another set of stairs.
